# MODULE_REGISTRY.md
# Project-layer file -- fill in for this specific service
# Generated by: aec init
# Last updated: {{INSTALL_DATE}}
#
# This file is read by:
#   - CLAUDE.md generation (aec update)
#   - Code Gen Agent (A09) -- selects correct layer and stack
#   - Refactor Agent (A10) -- scopes refactoring work
#   - Bug Triage Agent (A17) -- identifies affected module
#   - Legacy Explainer Agent (A11) -- knows which modules are risky
#   - Spec Writer Agent (A07) -- routes to correct owner
#   - Estimation Agent (A05) -- applies risk multipliers
#
# Add one row per module. A module is a meaningful unit of code
# with a clear single responsibility -- not every class or package,
# but every domain area, service layer, or distinct subsystem.
#
# Status values:
#   Active     -- in use and actively maintained
#   Legacy     -- not actively maintained, touch with caution
#   Deprecated -- being phased out, do not add new code
#
# Run: npx aec update   after editing this file.
